description:
Shared base for drawers that manage a removable login
credential (a passkey, a TOTP secret).

props.name: tab
props.description: The name of the currently active tab

props.name: icon
props.description: The default icon for the drawer header

props.name: id
props.description: A unique ID for the drawer

props.name: options
props.description: Option buttons for the drawer header

props.name: title
props.description: The default title for the drawer header

props.name: isAccount
props.description: Whether the drawer relates to the current user's own account.
